conversation.text: We tried WhatsApp automation before and it was awful. Sounded like a robot.
what went wrong with it specifically?
Just generic canned replies. Customers hated it.

yeah that's the standard template bots. we build from scratch around your tone and process so it actually sounds like its one of your team|||irony is you're probably not even sure if I'M a bot right now. that's the level we aim for. worth seeing how we fix the robotic side?
